creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Tanks for your reply.  However, this port got some error in tinderbox
test building, you can access the log here:

http://lucky7.cs.nctu.edu.tw/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=417

I'm currently thinking how to solve this, and this mail is just for your
information about I'm still working on your PR.  If you have time,
please help me to fix it.

Thanks in advance!

On Sun, Jun 17, 2007 at 00:48:21 +0800, Yinghong.Liu wrote:
> Thanks for your help. here is the new shar, please check it. Thanks!
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112607
> 
> --- openldev.patch begins here ---
> [...]
> X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
> X
> X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
> XINSTALL_TARGET=	install install-openldevdocDATA
> XMAN1=		openldev.1

Manual pages should not be affected bt NOPORTDOCS macro.  Only things
installed in DATADIR will be omitted when NOPORTDICS is defined.

> XPORTDOCS=	AUTHORS COPYING ChangeLog INSTALL NEWS README TODO
> X.endif
> X
> Xpost-patch:
> X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|wait.h|sys/wait.h|' \
> X		${WRKSRC}/openldev/openldev-file.h
> X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|naclocal|n${ACLOCAL}|' \
> X		-e 's|nautomake|n${AUTOMAKE}|' \
> X		-e 's|nautoconf|n${AUTOCONF}|' \
> X		${WRKSRC}/templates/console-c/console-c.pl \
> X		${WRKSRC}/templates/console-cxx/console-cxx.pl \
> X		${WRKSRC}/templates/gtk/gtk.pl
> X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|share/man/man1|man/man1|' \
> X		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
> X
> Xrun-autotools::
> X	${DO_NADA}
> X
> X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
> X	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
> X.for doc in ${PORTDOCS}
> X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${doc} ${DOCSDIR}
> X.endfor
> X.endif
> X
> X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

And this block seems not need to be in braces by bsd.port.{pre,post}.mk.
I'm not really sure, since it's just a first impression.  I'll look into
it after solving the building problem.

> [...]
> --- openldev.patch ends here ---

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
